message:
feat(web): Enhance analysis overlays with improved visuals and hotkeys

Improve KmerAnomalyOverlay and VirionStabilityOverlay with better
visualization primitives, HiDPI canvas rendering, and standardized
hotkey registration.

KmerAnomalyOverlay improvements:
- Replace manual RGB color interpolation with createLinearColorScale()
  utility for consistent, reusable color mapping
- Integrate ColorLegend primitive component for professional legend
  display with tick marks and labels
- Fix HiDPI rendering: use ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0)
  instead of ctx.scale(dpr, dpr) which accumulates on re-renders
- Update legend labels from "Normal/Anomalous" to more descriptive
  "Low deviation/High deviation"

VirionStabilityOverlay improvements:
- Migrate from manual window.addEventListener keydown handler to
  useHotkey() hook for standardized keyboard shortcut management
- Register Alt+V hotkey in 'Analysis' category with proper mode
  filtering (NORMAL mode only)
- Add visual fitness gauges for temperature and salt factors showing
  real-time environmental stress indicators
- Compute tempScore and saltScore with clamping for gauge display
- Color-code gauges: green for >70% fitness, warning color otherwise

These changes improve code maintainability by using shared primitives
and provide richer visual feedback for analysis operations.
